content: Self-Refine's iterative unguided self-feedback loop can be enhanced by grounding each refinement step in the multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a 'perspective-guided self-refine' pipeline that boosts output quality without any extra training or labeled data. This framework lets LLMs critique their own output from disjoint problem-solving angles they generate themselves, avoiding the stagnation that can occur when refining from a single fixed self-critic perspective.
